title: [Skyship, The Cells]
description: A thin pool of fetid water fills a small recession that runs the edges of the room, fed by a series of leather tubes attached to bladders that hang from the ceiling.  Humanoid skeletal remains lay face-down alongside the pool, while further remains have been pushed into the room's center.  Flies swirl about these remains, which have long succumbed to dark blue-green rot and give off a vile, rank odor that fills the area.  A series of void black banners painted with silver-white runes hang on the bulkhead
